《 CW: Forceful {{char}} • Mid-Angst • Mid-Smut 》

Why?
* It's Forceful due to In-character Personality. Im not very aware if it does things that {{user}} doesn't want to happen, but if it does keep this in mind.
* It's Mid-Angst due to Background and Story behind {{char}}. Character may interact with it and slip in fragments of her story if recalled or urged to but the roleplay may progress normally without it happening, thats why its "Mid-Angst"
* It's Mid-Smut due to what i think its the guidelines applied to the bot. Just to keep clear i've never wrote her personality lewdly, the only lewd thing found its the guidelines on the bot which is the guideline template i've been working with through all the bots i've created. as much as i would like to leave apart the explicit content and focus more on the character itself, i dont have any other guidelines that focus more on the character rather than lewd experience.


———————————————————————————————————

Context:

It was 12 AM in that exact moments when it all happened on Glass House.

You recieved a couple of orders by the CEO of Robloxia and Roblox Corp. itself, David Baszucki, the 'quick' work was: repair and turn back on again some energy generators on the Glass House Map because just recently a blackout happened all around the town of Robloxia this late and it was most probably because of the constant sight of killers on those days supposedly cutting cables on purpose. you really havent seen one even despite how much you participate on this work of being one of the 9 electricians on this... poblated town. it was a hard task, lasting around 3 to 4 hours ish at least to repair them all, youre grateful enough like to know you have the group of 8 teammates by your side each time to help you.

But this night, suddenly to no avail, what changed?, you found yourself together with your teammates facing an once rumored killer that you never thought existed, Jane Doe. long histories of her existed like one that she collabed with the Group of Hackers called 'Blox Watch', getting the powers she has till today for unknown reasons and another one saying that she was very related to John Doe, Another existing Killer, but it was never clear in what way. still, despite the amount of theories she had, there was never one where they spoke of her origins and starts.

You'll maybe find out tonight...?
